messages.meta.title: Base Quiz
messages.home.description: Pick a category, answer five questions, and race the clock. Build your streak, save your score onchain, and climb the global leaderboard.
messages.home.facts: 5 questions · 15 seconds each · scores saved onchain
messages.home.roadmap.title: Roadmap
messages.home.roadmap.subtitle: What we shipped and what is next
messages.home.roadmap.launch.title: Onchain launch
messages.home.roadmap.launch.desc: Scores saved on Base, global leaderboard
messages.home.roadmap.badges.title: Streaks & badges
messages.home.roadmap.badges.desc: Daily streaks and NFT badge tiers
messages.home.roadmap.categories.title: Names & categories
messages.home.roadmap.languages.title: 11 languages

messages.home.roadmap.miniapp.desc: Live as a mini app inside the Base App

messages.home.roadmap.daily.desc: A fresh reason to return each day

messages.home.roadmap.seasons.title: Seasons & rewards
messages.category.crypto.name: Crypto
messages.category.crypto.description: Test your knowledge of Base, Ethereum, wallets, DeFi, and the culture shaping the onchain world.
messages.category.sports.name: Sports
messages.category.sports.description: From football and basketball to tennis and the Olympics — see how strong your sports memory is.
messages.category.art.name: Art
messages.category.art.description: Explore painting, artists, movements, and the ideas that changed visual culture across generations.
messages.category.history.name: History
messages.category.history.description: Travel through civilizations, turning points, and the people whose decisions shaped the world.
messages.category.science.name: Science
messages.category.science.description: Challenge yourself across physics, biology, chemistry, and discoveries that explain how things work.
messages.category.geography.name: Geography
messages.category.geography.description: Navigate countries, capitals, oceans, and landmarks from every corner of our planet.
messages.quiz.autoNote: Answer once · next question loads automatically
messages.result.roundCompletedDetail: Five questions answered. Your final result is ready.
messages.result.streakUpdatedDetail: You are now on a {count}-day learning streak.
messages.result.save.idle.title: Save your score
messages.result.save.idle.detail: Record this result on Base and join the global leaderboard.
messages.result.save.pending.title: Confirm your score
messages.result.save.pending.detail: Approve the transaction in your wallet to finish saving.
messages.result.save.done.title: Score saved onchain
messages.result.save.done.detail: Your result is verified on Base and ready for the leaderboard.
messages.result.save.error.title: Save needs attention
messages.result.save.error.detail: Review the message below, then try the transaction again.
messages.result.save.disconnected.title: Connect to save
messages.result.save.disconnected.detail: Choose a wallet to record your score on Base.
messages.result.shareDetail: Challenge your friends on Farcaster or X.
messages.result.replayDetail: Play {category} again or choose a different challenge.
messages.leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
messages.leaderboard.description: Top players ranked by their total onchain score.
messages.leaderboard.empty: No scores yet. Be the first player on the board.
messages.badges.title: Badges
messages.badges.roadmapDescription: Keep playing, grow your streak, and claim each onchain milestone.
messages.badges.connectTitle: Connect to view and claim your badges
messages.badges.connectDetail: Your streak and NFT ownership are read directly from Base.
messages.badges.bronze.name: Bronze
messages.badges.silver.name: Silver
messages.badges.silver.description: Keep the streak alive for a week
messages.badges.gold.name: Gold
messages.badges.diamond.name: Diamond
messages.tutorial.welcomeDetail: A daily trivia game on Base. Test your knowledge, build streaks, and compete worldwide.
messages.tutorial.questionsDetail: Answer fast — quicker means more points. Save your score onchain to appear on the global leaderboard.
messages.tutorial.badgesDetail: Keep your streak alive and claim onchain NFTs: Bronze (3d), Silver (7d), Gold (30d), Diamond (100d).
messages.share.text:
🧠 I scored {score} points on Base Quiz! 🔥 Streak: {streak} days

Think you can beat me? 👇
messages.error.startFailed: The round could not be started. Please try again.
messages.error.startCancelled: Transaction cancelled. Confirm it to start the round.
messages.error.signatureCancelled: Wallet signature was cancelled. Sign the message to continue.
messages.error.signatureFailed: The wallet signature could not be verified. Please try again.
messages.error.saveFailed: The score could not be saved. Please try again.
messages.error.alreadyPlayed: Already saved today. Come back tomorrow.
messages.error.claimFailed: The badge could not be claimed. Please try again.
messages.activation.title: Activate the round contract
messages.activation.copy: This one-time Base transaction deploys the small contract used by Start Round. It does not change scores, streaks, badges, or transfer ETH.
messages.activation.errorCheck: Could not check the Base contract. Please try again.
messages.activation.errorCancelled: Transaction cancelled. No changes were made.
